name: Cultist
description: A robed fanatic with hollow eyes and symbols of dark powers. Their devotion makes them fearless and dangerous.

attacks.name: Ritual Dagger
attacks.description: A ceremonial blade stained with old blood

attacks.name: Dark Bolt
attacks.description: A bolt of shadowy energy that chills the soul

special_abilities.name: Fanatic
special_abilities.description: Never flees from combat, fights to the death

behavior.notes: Prefers Dark Bolt at range, never retreats
